conditions.notes: Applies to all FMLA leave reasons when leave is foreseeable.
conditions.source_text: employee must provide at least thirty (30) days advance notice prior to the date the leave is to begin

conditions.notes: When 30-day notice is not possible; notice given as soon as practicable.
conditions.source_text: notice must be given as soon as practicable, normally within one (1) or two (2) business days of when the employee knows the date leave will be needed

conditions.notes: Applies to birth or pregnancy and adoption leave when foreseeable.
conditions.source_text: employee must provide at least thirty (30) days advance notice prior to the date the leave is to begin

conditions.notes: When 30-day notice is not possible; notice given as soon as reasonably possible.
conditions.source_text: notice must be given as soon as reasonably possible, normally within one (1) or two (2) business days of when the employee knows the date leave will be needed
